ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Handedness of the participant (right or left) */,
  "participant_email" TEXT /* Email address for contact */,
  "participant_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Current occupation */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any relevant medical conditions */,
  "consent_form" TEXT /* Path to the signed consent form */,
  "date_of_consent" TEXT /* Date when the participant gave consent */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "ethical_approval" TEXT /* Ethical approval status and details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "stimulus_type" TEXT /* Type of stimulus (e.g., image, audio) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the stimulus image */,
  "stimulus_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the stimulus file (if different from URL) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the stimulus was created */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Name of the person who created the stimulus */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the stimulus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the trial belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who completed the trial */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Number of the block the trial belongs to */,
  "block_type" INTEGER /* Type of block the trial belongs to */,
  "letter_block" INTEGER /* Letter block the trial belongs to */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trial in seconds */,
  "trial_status" TEXT /* Status of the trial */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the response belongs to */,
  "pressed_key" TEXT /* Key pressed by the participant */,
  "correct_key" TEXT /* Correct key for the trial */,
  "correct" INTEGER /* Whether the response was correct */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time when the response was recorded */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the participant */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments by the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reaction_times" (
  "reaction_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction time */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response the reaction time belongs to */,
  "startRT" INTEGER /* Start reaction time */,
  "prepRT" INTEGER /* Preparation reaction time */,
  "rt" INTEGER /* Reaction time */,
  "response_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the response */,
  "response_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the response */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the reaction time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reaction_time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reaction_times_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_elapsed" (
  "time_elapsed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time elapsed */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial the time elapsed belongs to */,
  "time_elapsed" INTEGER /* Time elapsed for the trial */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the time elapsed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_elapsed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_elapsed_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factor" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the factor */,
  "factor_type" TEXT /* Type of the factor */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_factors" (
  "response_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response factor */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response the factor belongs to */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the factor */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the response factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_factors_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_factors_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES factor ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimulus_factors" (
  "stimulus_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus factor */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus the factor belongs to */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the factor */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the stimulus factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimulus_factors_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES factor ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stimulus_factors_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_design" (
  "experiment_design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment design */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the design belongs to */,
  "design_type" TEXT /* Type of experimental design */,
  "design_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the experimental design */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the experimental design */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_design_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
